title: Pan-Seared Norval with Sesame Crust
description: A French-inspired dish featuring a crispy sesame crust on a pan-seared norval fillet. This recipe highlights the delicate flavor of norval paired with the nutty taste of sesame.
instructions: Season the norval fillets with salt and black pepper.
In a shallow dish, mix together the sesame seeds, flour, and a pinch of salt.
Dip each norval fillet into the sesame mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Heat the butter in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the norval fillets for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until the norval is cooked through.
Remove the skillet from the oven and garnish with parsley.
Serve the norval fillets hot, with a side of your choice.
